title: French Buckwheat Galette
description: A classic French crepe-style galette made with buckwheat flour, perfect for breakfast or dinner. Serve with sweet or savory fillings.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together buckwheat flour, almond milk, egg, and salt. The batter should be smooth and free of lumps.
Heat a small non-stick pan or crepe pan over medium heat.
Pour a small amount of the batter into the pan and tilt to evenly coat the bottom.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until the edges start to curl and the surface is dry.
Loosen the galette with a spatula and flip. Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Serve the galette warm with melted butter, honey, and sliced strawberries if desired.
